songs.title: Sugar We're Goin Down
feed: “Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 12 spots to #1.
“Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 12 spots to #1.
“Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 175% to 336 points.
“Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 195 streams units.
“Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 280,042 total units.
